title: Foundation Models for Computational Pathology
subtitle: Featured thesis project
description: Benchmarking and evaluation pipeline for histopathology foundation models, combining whole-slide image representations and pathology report embeddings for cross-modal retrieval tasks.
details: Public repository for the TFM pipeline, with privacy-safe figures, synthetic examples and documentation for multimodal retrieval benchmarking in computational pathology.

title: VoxelMorph for Breast MRI Registration
subtitle: Public bachelor thesis project
description: Public GitHub repository for a breast MRI registration project based on VoxelMorph.
details: Established bachelor-thesis project already available on GitHub, highlighted here as a strong medical-imaging and registration repository.

title: Machine Learning for Classification and Regression
subtitle: Coursework portfolio
description: Selected supervised-learning coursework focused on classification, regression and evaluation workflows.
details: R Markdown material and supporting scripts covering supervised learning, unsupervised support analysis and regression-oriented interpretation.

title: Time Series Forecasting and ARIMA Modelling
subtitle: Forecasting coursework
description: Forecasting project covering smoothing models, Box-Jenkins logic and ARIMA-based short-horizon prediction.
details: R Markdown and script workflow built from a clean monthly wind-generation series, with a strong emphasis on reproducibility, holdout evaluation and interpretable classical forecasting methods.

title: Neural Networks and Simulation
subtitle: Deep-learning coursework
description: Neural-network and simulation coursework staged for future public cleanup.
details: Repository scaffold prepared; the main notebook still requires path cleaning, export reduction and a cleaner narrative before full publication.

title: Multivariate Analysis and Process Monitoring
subtitle: Exploratory analysis + PLS-DA monitoring
description: Public repository combining exploratory multivariate analysis with a clearly separated PLS-DA process-monitoring block.
details: The repository keeps introductory multivariate-analysis material apart from the later monitoring-and-diagnostics work, with the monitoring branch explicitly centered on PLS-DA outputs and diagnostic figures.

title: Production Planning and Parallel Machine Scheduling
subtitle: Engineering optimization project
description: Curated scheduling project built around unrelated parallel machines, release dates, setup times, precedence constraints and shared-resource limits.
details: Rebuilt from the full PPP project folder with safe CSV instance files, benchmark-extension documentation, cleaned Python scripts and solver-result summaries, without publishing the original Excel workbooks.
